name: No Offseason Golf
about: No Offseason Golf is an indoor golf facility located in Mars, Pennsylvania, featuring state-of-the-art Trackman golf simulators. The venue offers access to over 230 golf courses, driving ranges, and shot tracer technology. With 24/7 access and large private rooms, the facility is designed for serious practice and improvement year-round, regardless of weather conditions.
why_golfers_like_it: Accommodates large groups up to 8 players per bay
amenities_list: 60' Flat Screen TVs|16ft x 10ft HD Screen|24/7 Access|Private Bays|Golf Lessons

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but please contact the venue directly regarding rental availability.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food and drink policies are not specified on the website. Please contact No Offseason Golf directly.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, 18 holes on a simulator takes about 45 to 60 minutes.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, indoor golf simulators are generally family-friendly and suitable for juniors.
